description: Unblock the CEAC DS-160 worker end-to-end. Integrate 2captcha's image-to-text service so the CEAC start-page image CAPTCHA is solved programmatically (currently every run fails as 'gated' before a single field is filled), then expand the orchestrator's page fill coverage from 5 pages to the full DS-160 section set now that the simplified intake carries the complete answer set.

scopeContract.truthStatement: A DS-160 prefill run must succeed end-to-end in headless automation: pass the CEAC start-page CAPTCHA, reach and fill every DS-160 page for which we have answers, and stop at the Sign and Submit page as a handoff. The start-page image CAPTCHA is a solvable challenge, not a blocking anti-bot gate.
scopeContract.rejectedAssumption: The start-page image CAPTCHA is NOT an anti-bot wall we must escalate to ops. It is a standard text-in-image CAPTCHA that can be solved via 2captcha's ImageToText API, and must be treated as a routine step of session bootstrap. Separately, true anti-bot gates (Cloudflare, WAF, rate-limit interstitials) remain unsolvable and must continue to escalate as `ds160_blocked`.
scopeContract.designPrinciple: solve-what-is-solvable, escalate-what-is-not: the worker owns solving the start-page image CAPTCHA via 2captcha. It does NOT solve the final Sign-and-Submit CAPTCHA (that remains part of the stop-at-sign handoff contract). It does NOT attempt to defeat reCAPTCHA/hCaptcha/Cloudflare — those remain gates.
scopeContract.integrationNotes: 2captcha API key is read from env var TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY in viza-be/submission-service/.env (never committed). Use the v2 JSON API at https://api.2captcha.com (createTask + getTaskResult with type 'ImageToTextTask'). Budget ~30s per solve with polling; support wrong-answer retry (CEAC shows a validation message on bad code).

userStories.title: Pin the captcha-solver + full-page-fill scope and truth contract
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need the repo PRD to explicitly state that (a) the CEAC start-page image CAPTCHA must be solved via 2captcha rather than escalated as a gate, and (b) orchestrator page fill coverage must expand to the full DS-160 section set now that the simplified intake is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: prd.json contains US-021 through US-026 on branch ralph/ceac-captcha-and-full-page-fill
scopeContract explicitly distinguishes solvable start-page CAPTCHA from unsolvable anti-bot gates
scopeContract explicitly preserves the stop-at-sign contract — the final Sign-and-Submit CAPTCHA is NOT solved by the worker
integrationNotes document that TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY lives in .env, never in committed code or PRD
userStories.notes: This is the scope anchor. The goal is one unblocked prefill run end-to-end, not a generic CAPTCHA-bypass framework.

userStories.title: Implement a typed 2captcha ImageToText client module
userStories.description: As the CEAC worker, I need a small, tested 2captcha client so other modules can submit a CAPTCHA image and receive the decoded text without knowing HTTP details. The client must read its API key from env, support polling with a sane timeout, surface typed errors, and never log the API key.
acceptanceCriteria: New module at viza-be/submission-service/src/ceac/captcha-solver.ts exposes solveImageCaptcha(imageBuffer: Buffer): Promise<{ text: string; solveId: string; durationMs: number }>
Uses 2captcha v2 JSON API: POST https://api.2captcha.com/createTask with type 'ImageToTextTask' + base64 body, then poll https://api.2captcha.com/getTaskResult until status 'ready' or timeout
Reads API key from process.env.TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY; throws a typed TwoCaptchaConfigError on missing key
Typed errors for: ERROR_* codes from 2captcha, network timeout, solve timeout (>120s), zero-balance
The API key never appears in thrown messages or log output
Exports reportBadCaptcha(solveId) for wrong-answer feedback (2captcha refunds these)
Typecheck passes in viza-be/submission-service
userStories.notes: Keep the client narrow — one function to solve, one to report bad solves. No retry loop inside the client; callers decide retry policy.

userStories.title: Solve the CEAC start-page CAPTCHA during session bootstrap
userStories.description: As the CEAC worker, I need session bootstrap to extract the start-page CAPTCHA image, solve it via the 2captcha client, enter the answer into the code input, and proceed past the start page — so that downstream orchestration can actually run instead of every session dying at assertNoGate.
acceptanceCriteria: New helper in viza-be/submission-service/src/ceac/ (e.g. start-page-captcha.ts) that: locates the CEAC CAPTCHA image, screenshots or downloads it as a PNG buffer, calls solveImageCaptcha, types the result into the CEAC code input, and returns a typed outcome

startCeacSession invokes the helper AFTER navigating to the start page and BEFORE assertPage('start') succeeds on the post-CAPTCHA surface — OR — the helper is triggered at the point in the flow where the CAPTCHA actually appears (document the chosen seam in the code)
On successful solve, the worker clicks START AN APPLICATION (or equivalent) and confirms the next page identity advanced past the start/CAPTCHA surface
On wrong-answer validation, the worker calls reportBadCaptcha and retries up to 2 times before failing the run
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The CAPTCHA image selector is already listed in CEAC_GATE_MARKERS.captchaSelectors as img[id*="Captcha"]. Use Playwright's page.locator(...).screenshot() to capture just the image region — do NOT send the whole page.

userStories.title: Stop treating the start-page image CAPTCHA as a blocking gate
userStories.description: As the CEAC worker, I need gate detection to distinguish the solvable start-page image CAPTCHA from real anti-bot gates (Cloudflare, reCAPTCHA, rate-limit interstitials) so runs aren't misclassified as ds160_blocked when they are actually solvable.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate detection no longer throws GateDetectedError solely because img[id*="Captcha"] is present on the CEAC start page

Gate detection still throws for iframe[src*="recaptcha"], iframe[src*="hcaptcha"], #challenge-form, .cf-browser-verification, and anti-bot text patterns (access denied, unusual activity, checking your browser, etc.)
The distinction is explicit in code (e.g. split CEAC_GATE_MARKERS into 'solvable' vs 'blocking'), not a silent loosening of detection
If the start-page CAPTCHA solve attempt fails after retries, the run fails as ds160_prefill_failed (genuine runtime failure), NOT ds160_blocked
True anti-bot gates (Cloudflare, reCAPTCHA, text markers) continue to mark items as ds160_blocked and skip retries
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The scope contract rejects the assumption that the start-page CAPTCHA is a blocking gate. This story implements that distinction in the gate detector.

userStories.title: Expand orchestrator PAGE_FILL_MAP to cover all DS-160 sections the answer set supports
userStories.description: As the CEAC worker, I need the orchestrator to fill every DS-160 page for which we have answers — not just the 5 currently wired pages — so a prefill run produces a substantially complete DS-160 rather than a mostly-empty one stopped at Sign and Submit.
acceptanceCriteria: PAGE_FILL_MAP in viza-be/submission-service/src/ceac/orchestrator.ts is extended to cover the remaining DS-160 sections the simplified intake + dynamic form supply answers for (at minimum: security_background, family_relatives, family_spouse, previous_us_travel, us_contact, work_education_previous, work_education_additional, travel_companions, travel_paying)
Any missing CeacPageId values needed for these pages are added to pages.ts with heading/URL detection rules

If a DS-160_MAPPING_GROUPS entry for a page does not exist, the story EITHER adds a minimal mapping group using the existing FormFieldMapping shape OR documents in code why the page is intentionally left as a pass-through (with a follow-up TODO tag)
Pages without any answers for the applicant are advanced past without error (existing behavior preserved)
A completed run's ceac_result_payload lists which sections were filled vs skipped
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the 'orchestrator page coverage is narrow' gap flagged earlier. The simplified-form-complete run (US-015–US-020) proved the answer set is ready; this wires the worker to actually use it.

userStories.title: Persist CAPTCHA solve telemetry and prove end-to-end unblocked run
userStories.description: As an operator, I need each run's ceac_result_payload to record CAPTCHA solve attempts, cost, and duration, and I need a verifiable way to prove the full pipeline now runs end-to-end against the live CEAC start page on a real account.
acceptanceCriteria: Each CAPTCHA solve records: solveId, durationMs, attempt number (1/2/3), final outcome (solved / wrong_answer_retry / failed), into the structured result payload persisted on submission_queue.ceac_result_payload

The existing operator smoke script (viza-be/submission-service/src/ceac/smoke.ts) is extended with an optional --solve-captcha flag that exercises the new solver against the live start page and reports whether it reached a post-CAPTCHA surface
Documentation in viza-be/submission-service/docs/ceac-smoke-test.md is updated to explain the captcha-solve mode and how to interpret its outcomes
The CAPTCHA solver never logs the API key, the solved text in plaintext into long-lived storage, or the raw CAPTCHA image beyond the scope of a single run
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the verification story — it proves the captcha + expanded page fill actually unblock real runs, not just schema-level completeness.
